SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2023 BY CURTIS KARNOW. TRIAL IS HELD IN OPEN COURT ON THE RECORD. PARTIES PRESENT ARE DEFENDANT VALERIE KIRK AND PLAINTIFFS TRACY SEVUSH AND WILL SEVUSH AS WELL AS COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT MARRIANNE TALEGHANI. ALSO PRESENT IS COURT REPORTER CONNIE PARCHMAN CSR #6137 PARCHMAN1@GMAIL.COM 510.853.5260
